Name: usersAggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT DISTINCT ON ("default_role") * FROM "auth"."users" ORDER BY "default_role" ASC LIMIT 10) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root" ORDER BY "_root.pg.default_role" ASC NULLS LAST), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."display_name" AS "displayName", "_root.base"."default_role" AS "defaultRole") AS "_e")) AS "_root", "_root.base"."default_role" AS "_root.pg.default_role" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root")) AS "usersAggregate"
